## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Area

- [ ] Operating model
- [ ] Template
- [ ] Demo
- [ ] Automation prompt
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Safety or privacy guidance

## Learning workflow impact

Explain how this helps a learner, maintainer, or AI agent use the system better.

## Checklist

- [ ] No private study records, teacher files, copyrighted textbook pages, tokens, or account data are included.
- [ ] Demo material is fictional, cleaned, or explicitly public.
- [ ] The change supports the repo-as-review operating model.
- [ ] Large conceptual changes were discussed in an issue first.
- [ ] AI-assisted drafts were reviewed by a human.
